# 🎯 SKILLS Ecosystem Overview

## The Complete Picture

Your Masters admissions project now has **5 integrated SKILLs** that work together to automate your entire application workflow from research through interviews.

---

## 🏗️ How the SKILLs Connect

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│           ADMISSIONS TRACKER (Ongoing)                      │
│   Manages deadlines, checklists, blockers for ALL skills    │
└────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬───┘
     │                                                    │
     ├─→ RESEARCH DEEP DIVE ──→ SOP GENERATOR ──→ RESUME OPTIMIZER
     │   (Find insights)       (Write docs)       (Create applications)
     │                                                    │
     └────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────┘
                                  │
                          INTERVIEW PREP SPRINT
                          (Practice Q&A)
                                  │
                          SUBMIT & INTERVIEW
```

---

## 📋 Phase-by-Phase Execution Plan

### Phase 1: RESEARCH (June 2026)
**SKILL Used:** Research Deep Dive  
**Duration:** 1–2 hours per school (4 schools = 4–8 hours)  
**Outcome:** Program profiles, talking points, career paths  
**Impact:** Informs SOP strategy + Resume customization

```
Week 1: Research all 4 schools
  ├─ NYU SPS
  ├─ Simon (Rochester)
  ├─ Rutgers
  └─ CUNY Baruch
     ↓
Week 2: Create research summary documents
     ↓
Week 3: Identify school-specific talking points
```

---

### Phase 2: WRITING (July–August 2026)
**SKILLs Used:** SOP Generator + Resume Optimizer  
**Duration:** 2–4 hours per SOP, 1.5 hours per resume  
**Outcome:** 4 school-specific SOPs + 4 resumes  
**Impact:** Application documents ready for submission

```
Week 1–2: Draft all 4 SOPs
  ├─ Extract core story (all schools share this)
  ├─ Draft SOP #1 (NYU)
  ├─ Draft SOP #2 (Rochester)
  ├─ Draft SOP #3 (Rutgers)
  └─ Draft SOP #4 (CUNY)
     ↓
Week 3: Refine all 4 SOPs
  └─ Get feedback, fix weak paragraphs
     ↓
Week 4: Generate & optimize all 4 resumes
  ├─ Resume #1 (NYU) → ATS score
  ├─ Resume #2 (Rochester) → ATS score
  ├─ Resume #3 (Rutgers) → ATS score
  └─ Resume #4 (CUNY) → ATS score
```

---

### Phase 3: INTERVIEW PREP (August–September 2026)
**SKILL Used:** Interview Prep Sprint  
**Duration:** 3 hours admissions + 3 hours visa  
**Outcome:** Prepared, confident, practiced  
**Impact:** Better interview performance

```
August (Admissions Interview Prep)
├─ Review 15 common questions
├─ Practice "Why Analytics?" answer
└─ Do 3 mock interviews
   ↓
September (Visa Interview Prep)
├─ Review 25 visa questions
├─ Perfect "Why US?" answer
└─ Do 2 full 10-question mocks
```

---

### Phase 4: EXECUTION (September–October 2026)
**SKILL Used:** Admissions Tracker (primary) + others (as needed)  
**Duration:** 30 min–1 hour weekly + deadline crunches  
**Outcome:** All 4 applications submitted on time  
**Impact:** Admissions decisions in hand

```
September 1–15
└─ Portal opens for schools
   ├─ Create logins
   ├─ Upload documents
   └─ Add recommender contacts

September 15–October 15
└─ Submissions window
   ├─ Upload updated SOPs/Resumes
   ├─ Add test scores
   └─ Submit!

October 15–31
└─ Finish any late submissions
   ├─ Follow up on LOR status
   └─ Confirm receipt
```

---

### Phase 5: INTERVIEWS (October–December 2026)
**SKILL Used:** Interview Prep Sprint (continued) + Admissions Tracker  
**Outcome:** Interview scheduling + preparation  
**Impact:** Admission offers

```
October–November
├─ Admissions interview invitations arrive
├─ Schedule and prep
└─ Conduct interviews

December
├─ Admission decisions released
└─ Select school for F-1 visa
```

---

### Phase 6: VISA (December 2026–January 2027)
**Will use:** Visa Preparation Hub (SKILL coming Phase 2)  
**Outcome:** F-1 visa approved  
**Impact:** Ready to depart

```
December 2026
├─ I-20 received
├─ DS-160 filed
└─ Visa appointment scheduled

January 2027
└─ Visa interview + approval
```

---

## 📊 SKILL Dependency Map

```
┌─ Research Deep Dive ───┐
│  (Program profiles)    │
└──────────┬─────────────┘
           │ Informs
           ▼
        ┌─ SOP Generator ────────────┐
        │  (Write SOPs)              │
        └──────────┬─────────────────┘
                   │ & Research
                   │ insights
                   ▼
    ┌────────────────────────┐
    │  Resume Optimizer      │
    │  (ATS-optimized)       │ ← Uses research talking points
    └────────────┬───────────┘
                 │ & SOPs for
                 │ understanding
                 ▼
         ┌───────────────────┐
         │ Admissions        │ ← Uses all above for tracking
         │ Tracker           │   document completion
         └─────────┬─────────┘
                   │ + Manages deadlines
                   │ for next SKILL
                   ▼
         ┌───────────────────┐
         │ Interview Prep    │ ← Uses research + SOP for
         │ Sprint            │   answering questions
         └───────────────────┘
```

---

## ⚙️ Progressive Enhancement Timeline

Each SKILL improves over 4 phases:

### Phase 1 (June 2026) — Foundation ✅ ACTIVE
- Core prompts + templates
- Basic workflows
- Examples & reference materials

### Phase 2 (July–August 2026) — Coming
- Calendar integration (Tracker)
- Automated keyword weighting (Resume)
- Video analysis (Interview)
- Course database (SOP)

### Phase 3 (September 2026) — Coming
- ATS parsing simulation (Resume)
- AI-powered SOP scoring (SOP)
- School-specific interviewer profiles (Interview)
- Critical path analysis (Tracker)

### Phase 4 (October–December 2026) — Coming
- Multi-format resume export (Resume)
- A/B testing framework (SOP)
- Stress test mock interviews (Interview)
- Risk scoring & forecasting (Tracker)

---

## 🚀 How to Get Started

### Day 1 (Right Now)
1. Read this document
2. Explore `/research-deep-dive` SKILL
3. Pick one school to research

### Week 1
1. Research all 4 schools using `/research-deep-dive`
2. Save findings in `.github/skills/research-deep-dive/examples/`
3. Identify unique talking points per school

### Week 2–3
1. Use `/sop-generator` to write first SOP draft
2. Get feedback via `/adcom-review-simulation`
3. Iterate using `/strengthen-weak-paragraphs`

### Week 4
1. Use `/resume-optimizer` to create school-specific resume
2. Score with `/ats-score-grader`
3. Apply priority fixes

### August–September
1. Use `/interview-prep-sprint` to prepare
2. Use `/admissions-tracker` to manage deadlines
3. Submit applications on time

---

## 💡 Success Metrics

By the end of this project, you'll have:

✅ **Research Phase:**
- [ ] 4 complete program profiles
- [ ] 20+ school-specific talking points
- [ ] Career path mapping for each school
- [ ] Scholarship options identified

✅ **Writing Phase:**
- [ ] 4 school-specific SOPs (650 words each)
- [ ] 4 ATS-optimized resumes (8.5+/10 score)
- [ ] All documents tailored per school
- [ ] Admissions committee feedback incorporated

✅ **Interview Phase:**
- [ ] 40 Q&A practiced (15 admissions + 25 visa)
- [ ] 2 full mock interviews completed
- [ ] "Why Analytics?" answer perfected
- [ ] "Why US?" answer perfected

✅ **Submission Phase:**
- [ ] 4 applications submitted on time
- [ ] All documents confirmed uploaded
- [ ] Recommender letters submitted
- [ ] Test scores sent

✅ **Interview Phase:**
- [ ] 4 admissions interviews conducted
- [ ] 1 F-1 visa interview conducted
- [ ] Admission offer received
- [ ] School selected

✅ **Visa Phase:**
- [ ] I-20 in hand
- [ ] DS-160 completed
- [ ] Visa approved
- [ ] Ready to depart!
